title: Sanctions Screening Hold And Release
description: A risk-and-compliance control workflow that sequences screening, escalation, and approval gates before transaction progression. Focus case: sanctions screening hold and release.
assumptions: Each case represents a single transaction or payment instance.
Screening profiles and rule sets are preconfigured and available at runtime.
Approver and investigator identities are provisioned and mapped to approval groups.
Business‑unit and escalation memberships are stable for the duration of case processing.
Audit logging captures each state transition for regulatory traceability.
risks: High false‑positive rates causing operational backlog and customer impact.
Insufficient approver capacity leading to release delays and liquidity risk.
Inadequate segregation of duties enabling conflicts of interest in adjudication.
Missing or ambiguous evidence leading to incorrect release/hold decisions.
Policy mismatch between screening configuration and regulatory requirements causing non‑compliance.
